snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - begged (Saturday Night Live/2026)
snippet.description:
Presave 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out on June 12th: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq


Lyrics

All that I want
Is to know undoubtedly
That you just have eyes for me
Could you make it clear
All that I want
Is to sit here silently
And watch movies on TV
What a shame you’re not here

Here to witness my devotion
And my endless well of needs
I’m an anchor in the ocean
You know I could never leave

So I’m patient
You’re learning
Pretend it’s not hurting
Ohh
They say it’s a virtue
To not let good love slip away
So I’m cool and forgiving
I’ll take what you’re giving
Ohh
But nothing’s quite enough
When I know that to get it I begged
Yeah to get it I begged

And I have this thought
When I lay in bed at night
That I feel trapped inside my life
Is that a normal thing
To fight back the waves
Of a static lovers’ dread
I’m overwhelmed, I’m underfed
And yet I still cling

Cling to hope like snow on mountains
Careless words melt it away
I’m a penny in a fountain
Just waiting on my luck to change

So I’m patient
You’re learning
Pretend it’s not hurting
Ohh
‘Cause they say it’s a virtue
To not let good love slip away
So I’m cool and forgiving
I’ll take what you’re giving
Ohh
But nothing’s quite enough
When I know that to get it I begged
Yeah to get it I begged


#OliviaRodrigo #SNL #begged

➜   @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨ @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨ @wemmbumc

featuring: @ParrotX2 @dizzyu

snippet.title: The Mandalorian And Grogu - Last Trailer | "The Rebel Warrior Returns" | Star Wars | May 22, 2026
snippet.description:
#themandalorian #themandalorianandgrogu #pedropascal 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Star Wars The Mandalorian And Grogu (2026)  (More Info About This Video Down Below!)

The Mandalorian & Grogu takes the iconic duo into a bold new chapter as their story transitions from a serialized journey into a full cinematic experience. Set in a galaxy still recovering from the collapse of Imperial power, Din Djarin is pulled into missions that extend far beyond bounty hunting, placing him at the center of emerging conflicts across distant systems. Grogu’s role becomes more significant than ever, as his growing connection to the Force begins to shape the direction of events unfolding around them. The trailer focuses on scale, atmosphere, and the evolving bond between protector and child in a world filled with uncertainty.

As new factions rise and hidden threats begin to surface, Din Djarin must make choices that could redefine his path as a Mandalorian. Grogu’s presence turns every encounter into a high-stakes situation, attracting attention from forces seeking to control his future or harness his power. The film expands on Mandalorian culture, introduces new environments, and builds a larger narrative that connects personal stakes with galactic consequences. With cinematic visuals, emotional depth, and large-scale action, The Mandalorian & Grogu delivers a fresh Star Wars story centered on legacy, survival, and a journey that could change the fate of both characters forever.

snippet.title: WHO | Official trailer. A Wil Aime Film
snippet.description:
Du réalisateur Wil Aime, découvrez la bande-annonce de WHO Après 6 ans d’absence, le réalisateur Wil Aime revient avec son tout premier film au cinéma. Thriller psychologique à haute tension qui s’inscrit dans un monde où chaque décision a un prix, et où le temps ne laisse aucune place à l’erreur.

« Dans un monde de monstre, qui est le monstre ? »

OUVERTURE DE LA BILLETTERIE  : 
Rendez-vous le lundi 4 mai à 18h sur www.chaquedetail.fr pour réserver vos places avant qu’il ne soit trop tard…

SORTIES SALLES :

Canada : AVP 29 mai 2026. Puis dès le 5 juin 2026.
Afrique francophone : dès le 10 juin 2026.
Prochainement en Afrique anglophone, Amérique latine et reste de l’Europe.

snippet.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Cinematic Trailer
snippet.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
